task_completion.description: Create the 'CRISPR-Cas9 Protocol' tiddler with the correct tag, caption, and content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler named 'CRISPR-Cas9 Protocol' being created or viewed. It should have the tag 'CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs', a custom field 'caption' set to 'Protocol', and body text mentioning sgRNA targeting TP53, Cas9 RNP complex, electroporation, and clone screening.

task_completion.description: Create the 'CRISPR-Cas9 Equipment' tiddler with the correct tag, caption, and content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler named 'CRISPR-Cas9 Equipment' being created or viewed. It should have the tag 'CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs', a custom field 'caption' set to 'Equipment', and a table listing Cas9 protein (catalog 1081058), Lonza Nucleofector, and SF Cell Line Kit.

task_completion.description: Create the 'CRISPR-Cas9 Results' tiddler with the correct tag, caption, and content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler named 'CRISPR-Cas9 Results' being created or viewed. It should have the tag 'CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs', a custom field 'caption' set to 'Results', and body text mentioning 73% editing efficiency, ICE analysis, and off-target analysis.

task_completion.description: Create the 'CRISPR-Cas9 References' tiddler with the correct tag, caption, and content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler named 'CRISPR-Cas9 References' being created or viewed. It should have the tag 'CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs', a custom field 'caption' set to 'References', and body text containing the DOIs 10.1126/science.1258096 and 10.1038/nprot.2013.143.

task_completion.description: Create the 'CRISPR-Cas9 Project Overview' master tiddler using the tabs macro.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler named 'CRISPR-Cas9 Project Overview' in edit mode. The body should contain a macro call like `<<tabs "[tag[CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs]]" "CRISPR-Cas9 Protocol">>`.

task_completion.description: The master tiddler correctly renders the tabs with the default tab selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'CRISPR-Cas9 Project Overview' tiddler in view mode. It should display a tabbed interface with tabs for Protocol, Equipment, Results, and References. The 'Protocol' tab should be selected by default, showing its content.

integrity.description: The agent used the TiddlyWiki graphical user interface to create the tiddlers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking the '+' (New Tiddler) button, typing into the title, tags, fields, and body text areas within the TiddlyWiki web interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like `echo` or `sed` being used to directly modify the TiddlyWiki HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent actually typed the tabs macro rather than hardcoding HTML to look like tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The edit mode of the master tiddler should show the TiddlyWiki `<<tabs ...>>` macro syntax, not raw HTML/CSS for tabs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The main tiddler must be titled 'CRISPR-Cas9 Project Overview'. The tabs must be categorized with the tag 'CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs'. The default tab must be set to 'CRISPR-Cas9 Protocol'.
